simplified_equation: Credit loss ratio = f(bank effects, year effects, scenario indicators, balance sheet controls)
pedagogical_message: Credit losses are not only macro driven; they also depend on bank-specific portfolios.

simplified_equation: PPNR ratio = f(bank effects, year effects, scenario indicators, profitability controls)
pedagogical_message: PPNR is the first buffer against stress losses.

simplified_equation: CET1 depletion = f(credit losses, PPNR, RWA dynamics, initial CET1, bank effects, year effects)
pedagogical_message: Capital depletion aggregates multiple channels and is therefore harder to model than a single component.

simplified_equation: Predicted CET1 minimum ratio = Starting CET1 ratio - Predicted CET1 depletion
pedagogical_message: The integrated engine converts model components into a capital adequacy outcome.
